subject: Re: M to Relion5
body:
Morning Mart,
4A, nice!
Sorry, export directly from M is in the long tail of features that hasn’t been finalized in M - you’ll have to write a script that modifies your M particle star file making it compatible with WarpTools particle export, details here 
https://github.com/warpem/warp/issues/149
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jun 26, 2025, at 06:03, Mart Last <mgflast@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi,
Sorry if this has been asked before and/or is very obvious but I couldn't find anything about it.
I reached 4 A with M and without classifying particles. I'd like to try to sift out the worst particles in Relion5 (or in M, but I don't think that's a feature?) to see if the resolution can improve further.
Is there an easy way to export all particle coordinates and poses in a format that Relion5 can ingest?
Best,
Mart
